entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum americanum, a cereal crop tested for seedling emergence through soil crusts

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, a cereal crop tested for seedling emergence through soil crusts

entities.name: SEEDLING EMERGENCE
entities.description: The ability of seeds to emerge from the soil, specifically through soil crusts

entities.name: SOIL CRUST
entities.description: A hardened layer of soil on the surface that can impede seedling emergence

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of soil in which the field tests were conducted

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method to screen seedling emergence by comparing emergence through a crust to a control

entities.name: EMERGENCE RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of emergence through the crust to that found in the control (c/u)

entities.name: ZIMBABWE 6QQ
entities.description: A germplasm entry of pearl millet with high emergence ratio

entities.name: SUDAN 15K
entities.description: A germplasm entry of pearl millet with high emergence ratio

entities.name: TOGO P3271
entities.description: A germplasm entry of pearl millet with high emergence ratio

entities.name: IS2877
entities.description: A breeding line of sorghum with a high emergence ratio
